site.title: Yukai Gu
site.description: A small academic homepage and bilingual research notebook.

zh: 我关心机器学习系统如何从经验中形成可复用的知识，也关心研究文章在读者脑中真正发生作用的方式。
这个站点会保持接近裸 HTML：可读、可复制、可被搜索引擎和浏览器长期理解。公式、代码、引用和双语版本是第一等内容，而不是被框架包起来的装饰。
en: I am interested in how learning systems turn experience into reusable knowledge, and in how research writing can actually change the reader's working model.
This site stays close to plain HTML: readable, copyable, and durable. Equations, code, references, and bilingual versions are first-class material rather than decoration around a framework.

research.title: Learning from experience
research.description: Notes around reinforcement learning, continual learning, evaluation, and the gap between elegant algorithms and systems that keep working.

research.title: Research reading as infrastructure
research.description: A lightweight pipeline for turning reading, criticism, experiments, and translations into public academic notes.
